title: Redstone-chan's Enchantment Expansion
body:
English
> Make enchanting more fun~ (＞▽＜)
> 
> Optional Dependencies for the Data Pack:
> 1. [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader) – Required for globally loading data packs or similar mods, as it needs to load lang file translations.
> 2. [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) – Used to check enchantment details.
> 3. [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix) (or similar mods) – Fixes attribute-related issues.
> 4. [Anvil Never Too Expensive](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/anvil-never-too-expensive) (or similar mods) – Removes the "Too Expensive" limit on anvils.

中文
> 让附魔变得更有趣吧~（＞▽＜）
> 
> 数据包可选前置：
> 1. [开放式加载](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)：用于全局加载数据包或相似模组，因为需要加载lang文本翻译
> 2. [附魔描述](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)：用于查询附魔说明
> 3. [属性修复](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix)：属性修复或相似模组
> 4. [不昂贵](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/anvil-never-too-expensive)：移除铁砧昂贵或相似模组

> English
> <details>
> <summary>[Curse] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Rust Curse(Lv.3 Max)：Items lose extra durability with each use (loss increases with level)
> 2. Blast Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Chance to trigger an explosion when taking damage
> 3. Stillness Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Player takes damage when standing still
> 4. Hunger Curse(Lv.4 Max)：Wearer continuously gains the Hunger effect (strength scales with level)
> 5. breaking Curse(Lv.4 Max)：Extra durability consumed per use (chance increases with level)
> 6. Blindness Curse(Lv.3 Max)：Wearer continuously gains the Blindness effect (strength scales with level)
> 7. Acrophobia Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Gain Nausea, Slowness, and Freezing effects when above Y=180
> 8. Basiphobia Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Gain Mining Fatigue and Darkness effects when below Y=-36
> 9. Death Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Chance to instantly die when attacking
> 10. Gravity Curse(Lv.3 Max)：Increases fall speed and damage
> 11. Hiding Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Attacks may turn targeted mobs invisible
> 12. Unlucky Curse(Lv.4 Max)：Reduces your luck
> 13. Short Reach(Lv.3 Max)：Reduces interaction and attack range (effect scales with level)
> 14. Clumsiness Curse(Lv.4 Max)：Chance to drop items when used (chance increases with level)
> 15. Double-Edged Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Chance to harm yourself when attacking
> 16. Water Source Curse(Lv.1 Max)：Taking damage or debuffs when touching water
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Universal] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Sacrifice(Lv.5 Max)：Automatically repairs held items when taking damage [Conflict：Unbreaking/Mending/Advanced Unbreaking]
> 2. Advanced Unbreaking(Lv.1 Max)：80% chance to not consume durability when applied [Conflict：Unbreaking/Mending/Sacrifice]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Weapon] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. First Impression (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to untouched targets (including sweep attacks; scales with level)
> 2. Shadow Assault (Lv.1 Max)：Chance to deal double damage on hit [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/XP Blade/Committed/Exorcism/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 3. XP Blade (Lv.4 Max)：Consumes 15 XP to boost attack damage (scales with level; requires Lv. 10 to activate) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/Committed/Exorcism/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 4. Committed (Lv.3 Max)：Deals increased damage to already injured mobs (scales with level) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Exorcism/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 5. Exorcism (Lv.5 Max)：Deals massive damage to Allays, Vexes, Blazes, Breezes, Witches, and Evokers (scales with level) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Committed/Bane Series/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Sword] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Boss Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to bosses (scales with level) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 2. Small Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals multiplied damage to small mobs (scales with level) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 3. Illager Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to raid mobs (scales with level) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 4. Nether Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to Nether mobs (scales with level; excludes bosses) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 5. End Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to End mobs (scales with level; excludes bosses) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 6. Phantom Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to Phantoms (scales with level) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 7. Poison Touch (Lv.3 Max)：Poisons targets on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Wither Touch]
> 8. Wither Touch (Lv.3 Max)：Inflicts Wither on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Poison Touch]
> 9. XP Reaper (Lv.3 Max)：Grants bonus XP for killing mobs (scales with level; direct kills only)
> 10. Devour (Lv.1 Max)：Restores hunger when attacking; converts to health regeneration when full
> 11. Chains (Lv.4 Max)：Stuns hit targets and nearby mobs briefly (scales with level)
> 12. Dynamo (Lv.4 Max)：Increases attack power while sprinting (scales with level)
> 13. Swift Shadowcutter (Lv.3 Max)：Boosts attack speed (scales with level) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Committed/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 14. Under Pressure (Lv.3 Max)：Grants Haste, Strength, and Speed on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Committed/Swift Shadowcutter/Unleash Potential/Last Pope]
> 15. Resilience Shield (Lv.4 Max)：Increases knockback resistance (scales with level)
> 16. Unleash Potential (Lv.1 Max)：Grants Haste, Speed, and Strength when hunger is below 3 drumsticks (strength increases as hunger depletes) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Committed/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Last Pope]
> 17. Water Bottle Projection (Lv.2 Max)：Throws water bottles at targets when attacking
> 18. Last Hope (Lv.1 Max)：Consumes the weapon to instantly kill a target (destroys the weapon) [Conflict：Sharpness/Smite/Bane of Arthropods/Impaling/Loyalty/Power/Sacrifice/XP Blade/Committed/Swift Shadowcutter/Under Pressure/Unleash Potential]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Bow] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Speed Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Speed and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 2. Slowness Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Slowness and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 3. Regeneration Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Regeneration and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 4. Hunger Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Hunger and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 5. Blindness Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Blindness and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 6. Glowing Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Glowing and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 7. Poison Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Poison and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 8. Wither Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Wither and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 9. Slow Falling Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Slow Falling and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 10. Wind Charge Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Wind Charge and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 11. Infested Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Infested and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 12. Oozing Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Oozing and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 13. Weaving Splash (Lv.3 Max)：Applies Weaving and creates an area-effect cloud on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 14. Anvil Rain (Lv.1 Max)：Spawns anvils upon hitting a target area [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 15. Dripstone Rain (Lv.1 Max)：Spawns dripstones upon hitting a target area [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 16. Evoker's Wrath (Lv.1 Max)：Summons Evoker fangs on hit (quantity scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 17. Frost Arrows (Lv.1 Max)：Freezes targets and nearby water into ice on hit [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 18. Flame Arrows (Lv.1 Max)：Ignites targets on hit [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Frost Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 19. Accuracy Shot (Lv.1 Max)：Arrows fly straight without gravity; vanish if missed
> 20. Blast Arrows (Lv.3 Max)：Explodes on hit (radius and damage scale with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 21. Bomb Arrows (Lv.3 Max)：Causes powerful explosions and knockback on hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Blast Arrows/Fatal Arrow/Eternal Frost]
> 22. Bullet Time (Lv.3 Max)：Grants Slow Falling while moving (scales with level)
> 23. Fatal Arrow (Lv.1 Max)：Instantly kills non-boss mobs (no loot drops; applies debuff after use) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Blast Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Eternal Frost]
> 24. Glass Breaker (Lv.1 Max)：Destroys glass on hit
> 25. Replenish (Lv.4 Max)：Chance to not consume arrows (scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity]
> 26. Shotgun (Lv.6 Max)：Fires multiple arrows at once (quantity scales with level)
> 27. Scatter (Lv.3 Max)：Increases arrow spread (scales with level) [Conflict：Focus]
> 28. Focus (Lv.3 Max)：Reduces arrow spread (scales with level) [Conflict：Scatter]
> 29. Chain Reaction (Lv.3 Max)：Injured mobs may shoot 6 arrows at nearby enemies (chance scales with level)
> 30. Ricochet (Lv.3 Max)：Arrows bounce from hit targets to nearby mobs (bounces scale with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Trident] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Water Bane (Lv.5 Max)：Deals bonus damage to ocean mobs (scales with level) [Conflict：Bane Series/Exorcism]
> 2. Sea Breeze (Lv.3 Max)：Launches wind charges on hit [Conflict：Underwater Blast]
> 3. Thundering (Lv.1 Max)：Triggers thunderstorms when hitting lightning rods in rain
> 4. Underwater Blast (Lv.1 Max)：Summons lit TNT when attacking underwater [Conflict：Sea Breeze]
> 5. Throwing Boost (Lv.5 Max)：Increases projectile damage (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Mace] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Boltbringer (Lv.1 Max)：Summons lightning when attacking from ≥8 blocks high [Conflict：Dive Bomb]
> 2. Dive Bomb (Lv.3 Max)：Grants jump boost; triggers explosions when attacking from ≥4 blocks high (radius scales with height/level) [Conflict：Boltbringer]
> 3. Light-Heavy Dualism (Lv.5 Max)：Increases attack range and reduces gravity (scales with level)
> 4. Slugger (Lv.3 Max)：Chance to inflict heavy slowness on mobs (scales with level)
> 5. Wind Propulsion (Lv.3 Max)：Launches you upward when hitting the ground (height scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Tool] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Bedrock Breaker (Lv.1 Max)：Allows breaking bedrock (no drops; consumes massive durability) [Conflict：Illusionary Rock]
> 2. Illusionary Rock (Lv.1 Max)：Converts bedrock to reinforced deepslate (consumes massive durability) [Conflict：Bedrock Breaker]
> 3. Haste (Lv.3 Max)：Grants Haste when held (scales with level)
> 4. XP Spring (Lv.3 Max)：Grants bonus XP when mining (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Shield] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Absorbent Shield (Lv.2 Max): Grants 10s of Absorption after blocking (10s cooldown; scales with level) [Conflict：Cleansing/Crispbread/Stable Shield/Shield of Strength]
> 2. Cleansing (Lv.1 Max): Clears all effects when moving with shield off-hand (consumes durability) [Conflict：Absorbent/Crispbread/Stable Shield/Shield of Strength]
> 3. Crispbread (Lv.3 Max): Grants Saturation when moving with shield off-hand [Conflict：Absorbent/Cleansing/Stable Shield/Shield of Strength]
> 4. Shield Armor (Lv.5 Max): Increases armor when holding a shield off-hand
> 5. Stable Shield (Lv.2 Max): Negates knockback when holding shield (scales with level) [Conflict：Absorbent/Cleansing/Crispbread/Shield of Strength]
> 6. Shield of Strength (Lv.3 Max): Chance to gain Strength when hit (scales with level) [Conflict：Absorbent/Cleansing/Crispbread/Stable Shield]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Weapon+Tool] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Extend(Lv.3 Max)：Increases attack/interaction range (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Sword+Bow] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Air Toss(Lv.3 Max)：Launches hit mobs into the air [Conflict：Lightning]
> 2. Lightning Strike(Lv.3 Max)：Summons lightning when attacking or hitting redstone blocks with arrows [Conflict：Air Toss]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Trident+Bow] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Eternal Frost(Lv.3 Max)：Freezes targets and nearby water into packed ice on hit (radius scales with level) [Conflict：Infinity/Splash Series/Anvil Rain/Dripstone Rain/Evoker's Wrath/Frost Arrows/Flame Arrows/Blast Arrows/Bomb Arrows/Fatal Arrow]
> 2. Teleport(Lv.1 Max)：Swaps positions with the target on hit
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Elytra] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Ender Heart(Lv.2 Max)：Grants Regeneration while flying (+Max HP at Lv. 2; scales with level)
> 2. Moonwalk(Lv.3 Max)：Reduces gravity while flying (scales with level)
> 3. Safe Landing(Lv.5 Max)：Increases safe fall height (up to +12 blocks; scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Armor] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Daylight Protection (Lv.4 Max)：Doubles protection during daytime [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Nighttime Protection/End Protection/Nether Protection/Risky Edge/Fury/Weak Armor]
> 2. Nighttime Protection (Lv.4 Max)：Doubles protection during nighttime [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/End Protection/Nether Protection/Risky Edge/Fury/Weak Armor]
> 3. End Protection (Lv.4 Max)：Doubles protection in the End [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/Nighttime Protection/Nether Protection/Risky Edge/Fury/Weak Armor]
> 4. Nether Protection (Lv.4 Max)：Doubles protection in the Nether [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/Nighttime Protection/End Protection/Risky Edge/Fury/Weak Armor]
> 5. Risky Edge (Lv.3 Max): Increases attack but reduces defense [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/Nighttime Protection/Nether Protection/End Protection/Fury/Weak Armor]
> 6. Fury (Lv.4 Max): Boosts attack and armor penetration but lowers defense (scales with level) [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/Nighttime Protection/Nether Protection/End Protection/Risky Edge/Weak Armor]
> 7. Exoskeleton (Lv.4 Max): Increases armor toughness (scales with level)
> 8. Fireproof (Lv.4 Max): Reduces fire duration (scales with level)
> 9. Weak Armor (Lv.4 Max): Lowers defense but increases speed; grants Resistance while sneaking on ground (scales with level) [Conflict：Protection/Fire Protection/Blast Protection/Projectile Protection/Daylight Protection/Nighttime Protection/Nether Protection/End Protection/Risky Edge/Fury]
> 10. Snowball (Lv.3 Max): Chance to throw snowballs at attackers when hit (scales with level)
> 11. Fortitude (Lv.4 Max): Increases armor (scales with level)
> 12. Frost Thorns (Lv.5 Max): Inflicts Slowness/Weakness on attackers (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Helmet] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. [Trail] Trial Omen (Lv.1 Max): Leaves Trial Omen particles while moving
> 2. [Trail] Cherry Blossoms (Lv.1 Max): Leaves cherry blossom particles while moving
> 3. [Trail] Dragon's Breath (Lv.1 Max): Leaves dragon breath particles while moving
> 4. [Trail] Sculk Soul (Lv.1 Max): Leaves sculk soul particles while moving
> 5. [Trail] Firework Rocket (Lv.1 Max): Leaves firework trail particles while moving
> 6. [Trail] Glow (Lv.1 Max): Leaves glow particles while moving
> 7. [Trail] Snowflakes (Lv.1 Max): Leaves snowflake particles while moving
> 8. [Trail] Orange Stars (Lv.1 Max): Leaves orange star particles while moving
> 9. [Trail] White Stars (Lv.1 Max): Leaves white star particles while moving
> 10. Minify (Lv.4 Max): Shrinks player size (scales with level) [Conflict：Maximize]
> 11. Maximize (Lv.4 Max): Enlarges player size (scales with level) [Conflict：Minify]
> 12. Lucky Glow (Lv.5 Max): Grants Luck (scales with level) [Conflict：Luck Boost]
> 13. Luck Boost (Lv.5 Max): Increases luck (scales with level) [Conflict：Lucky Glow]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Chestplate] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Bulletproof (Lv.1 Max)：60% chance to ignore sniper bullet damage
> 2. Resilient Bastion (Lv.3 Max)：Boosts Resistance (scales with level)
> 3. Retrieval (Lv.4 Max)：Collects arrows shot at you into inventory (scales with level)
> 4. Vitality (Lv.4 Max)：Increases max health (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Leggings] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Swift Swim (Lv.1 Max): Greatly increases underwater speed
> 2. Sneak Sanctuary (Lv.4 Max): Grants Resistance while sneaking (with Slowness)
> 3. Cloak of Invisibility (Lv.1 Max): Grants Invisibility while sneaking
> 4. Resilient Sentinel (Lv.4 Max): Chance to gain Resistance/weaken attackers when hit (scales with level)
> 5. Safe Fall (Lv.4 Max): Increases safe fall height (scales with level)
> 6. Striding (Lv.3 Max): Increases step height and base speed (scales with level)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Boots] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Speed Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Speed effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 2. Slowness Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Slowness effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 3. Haste Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Haste effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 4. Strength Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Strength effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 5. Jump Boost Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Jump Boost effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 6. Regeneration Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Regeneration effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 7. Resistance Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Resistance effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 8. Weakness Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Weakness effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 9. Poison Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Poison effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 10. Wither Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Wither effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 11. Glowing Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates a Glowing effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 12. Burning Aura (Lv.1 Max): Ignites a 2-block radius while moving (grants Fire Resistance) [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 13. Infested Aura (Lv.1 Max): Creates an Infested effect in a 4-block radius while moving [Conflict: Aura Series]
> 14. Magma Walker (Lv.2 Max): Turns lava into basalt while walking [Conflict: Frost Walker/Depth Strider/Turf Walker/Snowmelt Walker]
> 15. Turf Walker (Lv.2 Max): Turns dirt into grass blocks while walking [Conflict: Frost Walker/Depth Strider/Magma Walker/Snowmelt Walker]
> 16. Snowmelt Walker (Lv.2 Max): Melts snow while walking [Conflict: Frost Walker/Depth Strider/Magma Walker/Turf Walker]
> 17. Gallop (Lv.3 Max): Increases sprint speed (scales with level) [Conflict: Soul Speed/Sand Sprint/End Sprint]
> 18. Sand Sprint (Lv.3 Max): Boosts speed on sand [Conflict: Soul Speed/Gallop/End Sprint]
> 19. End Sprint (Lv.3 Max): Grants Speed in the End (scales with level) [Conflict: Soul Speed/Gallop/Sand Sprint]
> 20. Crop Dance (Lv.1 Max): Accelerates crop growth when sneaking through farmland
> 21. Jump Boost (Lv.3 Max): Increases jump height (scales with level)
> 22. Pegasus (Lv.1 Max): Grants Slow Falling while riding
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Horse Armor] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Frost Hooves(Lv.4 Max)：Freezes nearby water into packed ice while moving
> 2. My Little Pony(Lv.1 Max)：Shrinks horse size and increases jump power
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Horse+Wolf Armor] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Enhanced Armor(Lv.4 Max)：Boosts defense but reduces jump height by 50%
> 2. Messenger(Lv.4 Max)：Increases mount maneuverability
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[Wolf Armor] Type Enchantments</summary>
> 
> 1. Wolf Spirit Shield(Lv.5 Max)：Boosts all wolf armor stats (scales with level)
> 
> </details>

> 中文
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[诅咒]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 腐蚀 (最大3级)：物品耐久度每次使用都会额外失去(失去的耐久值随等级提升)
> 2. 自爆 (最大1级)：受到伤害时有几率引发爆炸
> 3. 静止诅咒 (最大1级)：当玩家静止不动时会受到伤害
> 4. 饥饿诅咒 (最大4级)：使穿戴者持续获得饥饿效果(效果随等级提升)
> 5. 破损诅咒 (最大4级)：每次使用都会消耗额外耐久(消耗几率随等级提升)
> 6. 失明诅咒 (最大3级)：使穿戴者持续获得失明效果(效果随等级提升)
> 7. 恐高症 (最大1级)：当高度超过180时获得反胃、缓慢和霜冻效果
> 8. 低洼恐惧症 (最大1级)：当高度低于-36时获得挖掘疲劳和黑暗效果
> 9. 死亡诅咒 (最大1级)：攻击时有几率立即死亡
> 10. 重力诅咒 (最大3级)：增加坠落速度和伤害
> 11. 隐形诅咒 (最大1级)：攻击会使目标生物隐形
> 12. 倒霉诅咒 (最大4级)：你的运气会变差
> 13. 短手诅咒 (最大3级)：减少交互和攻击距离(效果随等级提升)
> 14. 笨拙诅咒 (最大4级)：使用时有几率掉落物品(几率随等级提升)
> 15. 双刃剑诅咒 (最大1级)：使用时有几率伤害自己
> 16. 水源诅咒 (最大1级)：接触水会受到伤害或负面效果
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[通用]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 牺牲(最大5级)：受到攻击时自动修复手持物品[排斥：耐久/经验修补/高级耐久]
> 2. 高级耐久(最大1级)：应用附魔到物品时，有80%概率不消耗耐久[排斥：耐久/经验修补/牺牲]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[武器]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> [武器]类型附魔
> 1. 第一印象 (最大5级)：对未攻击过的目标(包括横扫击中)造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升)
> 2. 影袭 (最大1级)：攻击时有概率造成双倍伤害[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/经验利刃/承诺/驱魔/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 3. 经验利刃 (最大4级)：消耗15点经验值提升攻击伤害(效果随等级提升，需10级启动)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/承诺/驱魔/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 4. 承诺 (最大3级)：击中已经受伤的生物会造成更高的伤害(效果随等级提升)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/驱魔/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 5. 驱魔 (最大5级)：对悦灵、恼鬼、烈焰人和旋风人造成高额伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/承诺/克星系列/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[剑]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. Boss克星 (最大5级)：对Boss生物造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 2. 微小克星 (最大5级)：对小型生物造成多倍伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 3. 灾厄克星 (最大5级)：对袭击生物造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 4. 下界克星 (最大5级)：对下界生物造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升，Boss除外)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 5. 末地克星 (最大5级)：对末地生物造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升，Boss除外)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 6. 幻翼克星 (最大5级)：对幻翼造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 7. 毒触之刃 (最大3级)：攻击时使目标中毒(加成随等级提升)[排斥：凋零之触]
> 8. 凋零之触 (最大3级)：攻击时使目标凋零(加成随等级提升)[排斥：毒触之刃]
> 9. 经验收割者 (最大3级)：击杀生物时获得额外经验(加成随等级提升)
> 10. 吞噬 (最大1级)：攻击生物时恢复饥饿值，满饥饿时转为生命恢复
> 11. 锁链 (最大4级)：击中生物会导致自身和附近的多个生物在短时间内被眩晕(效果随等级提升)
> 12. 发电机 (最大4级)：冲刺时增加攻击力(效果随等级提升)
> 13. 迅捷斩影 (最大3级)：提升攻击速度(效果随等级提升)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/承诺/越战越勇/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 14. 越战越勇 (最大3级)：攻击时获得急迫、力量和迅捷效果(效果随等级提升)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/承诺/迅捷斩影/激发潜能/最后的希望]
> 15. 抗击之盾 (最大4级)：提升击退抗性(效果随等级提升)
> 16. 激发潜能 (最大1级)：饥饿值低于3鸡腿时获得急迫、速度、力量(效果随饥饿值降低而增强)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/承诺/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/最后的希望]
> 17. 水瓶投射 (最大2级)：攻击时向目标投掷水瓶
> 18. 最后的希望 (最大1级)：消耗武器对目标造成一击必杀效果(使用后武器消失)[排斥：锋利/亡灵/节肢/穿刺/致密/力量/影袭/经验利刃/承诺/迅捷斩影/越战越勇/激发潜能]
> 
> </details>
>

> 16. 唤起者之怒 (最大1级)：命中区域生成滴水石锥攻击(效果随等级提升)[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/冰霜箭/火焰箭/爆炸箭/爆裂箭矢/绝命箭矢/永恒冰霜]
> 17. 冰霜箭 (最大1级)：命中区域产生冻结效果，有水则冻结成冰[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/火焰箭/爆炸箭/爆裂箭矢/绝命箭矢/永恒冰霜]
> 18. 火焰箭 (最大1级)：命中区域产生火焰效果[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/冰霜箭/爆炸箭/爆裂箭矢/绝命箭矢/永恒冰霜]
> 19. 精准射击 (最大1级)：箭矢无视重力直飞目标，未命中会消失
> 20. 爆裂箭矢 (最大3级)：命中产生爆炸伤害(范围和伤害随等级提升)[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/唤起者之怒/冰霜箭/火焰箭/爆炸箭/绝命箭矢/永恒冰霜]
> 21. 爆炸箭 (最大3级)：命中产生强力爆炸和击退(范围和伤害随等级提升)[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/唤起者之怒/冰霜箭/火焰箭/爆裂箭矢/绝命箭矢/永恒冰霜]
> 22. 子弹时间 (最大3级)：移动时获得缓降效果(效果随等级提升)
> 23. 绝命箭矢 (最大1级)：一击必杀非Boss生物(无掉落战利品，使用后给予DeBuff)[排斥：无限/所有蔓延/铁砧雨/石锥雨/唤起者之怒/冰霜箭/火焰箭/爆裂箭矢/爆炸箭/永恒冰霜]
> 24. 玻璃破坏者 (最大1级)：命中区域破坏玻璃
> 25. 补充 (最大4级)：有概率不消耗箭矢(几率随等级提升)[排斥：无限]
> 26. 霰弹枪 (最大6级)：一次射出多支箭矢(数量随等级提升)
> 27. 分散 (最大3级)：增加每支箭的散布(效果随等级提升)[排斥：焦点]
> 28. 焦点 (最大3级)：减少每支箭的散布(效果随等级提升)[排斥：分散]
> 29. 连锁反应 (最大3级)：受伤的生物有几率使它们向附近的生物发射6支箭(概率随等级提升)
> 30. 跳弹 (最大3级)：击中一个生物会让箭从生物身上反弹并击中附近的另一个生物(次数随等级提升)

> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[三叉戟]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 水生克星(最大5级)：对海洋生物造成额外伤害(加成随等级提升)[排斥：所有克星/驱魔]
> 2. 海风(最大3级)：命中时产生推进风弹[排斥：水下爆破]
> 3. 雷鸣(最大1级)：雨天命中避雷针时引发雷暴
> 4. 水下爆破(最大1级)：水中攻击时召唤点燃的TNT[排斥：海风]
> 5. 投掷强化(最大5级)：提升投掷物伤害(效果随等级提升)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[重锤]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 闪电使者(最大1级)：从高处(≥8格)攻击时召唤闪电[排斥：俯冲炸弹]
> 2. 俯冲炸弹(最大3级)：提供跳跃加成，从高处(≥4格)攻击时引发爆炸(范围和高度随等级提升)[排斥：闪电使者]
> 3. 轻重两仪(最大5级)：增加攻击范围并降低重力(效果随等级提升)
> 4. 重击手(最大3级)：攻击有几率对生物造成强力减速(触发几率随等级提升)
> 5. 风力推进(最大3级)：攻击地面可将自己弹向空中(高度随等级提升)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[工具]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 基岩破坏者(最大1级)：允许破坏基岩(不产生掉落，消耗巨量耐久)[排斥：幻岩转化]
> 2. 幻岩转化(最大1级)：将基岩转化为强化深板岩(消耗巨量耐久)[排斥：基岩破坏者]
> 3. 急速(最大3级)：手持时获得急迫效果(效果随等级提升)
> 4. 经验源泉(最大3级)：挖掘时获得额外经验(加成随等级提升)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>[盾牌]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 吸收护盾(最大2级)：格挡后获得10秒伤害吸收效果(冷却10秒，效果随等级提升)[排斥：净化/饱食/抗退盾牌/力量之盾]
> 2. 净化(最大1级)：副手持盾移动时清除所有效果(消耗耐久)[排斥：吸收护盾/饱食/抗退盾牌/力量之盾]
> 3. 饱食(最大3级)：持盾移动时获得饱食效果[排斥：吸收护盾/净化/抗退盾牌/力量之盾]
> 4. 盾甲(最大5级)：持盾时增加护甲值
> 5. 抗退盾牌(最大2级)：副手持盾时免疫击退(效果随等级提升)[排斥：吸收护盾/净化/饱食/力量之盾]
> 6. 力量之盾(最大3级)：被击中时有几率获得力量效果(几率随等级提升)[排斥：吸收护盾/净化/饱食/抗退盾牌]
> 
> </details>

>

>

> 
> <details>
> <summary>[剑+弓]类型附魔</summary>
> 
> 1. 空中抛掷(最大3级)：攻击时将被击中的生物抛向空中[排斥：闪电打击]
> 2. 闪电打击(最大3级)：攻击时或箭矢命中红石块时召唤闪电[排斥：空中抛掷]
>
